_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Garrett Whitlock activated from IL, returns to bullpen after knee injury
items.snark: Whitlock's back just in time to watch the offense score one run per game, so that's cool.

items.headline: Red Sox at Rays matinee: Interim manager Chad Tracy hasn't named starter
items.snark: Chad Tracy's strategy is apparently to let the Rays guess who's pitching, because we sure as hell don't know either.

items.headline: Red Sox lost to Rays 4-3 Tuesday, Marcelo Mayer's two-run double off first base
items.snark: Mayer got lucky when the ball ricocheted off first base, which is the only kind of offense this team can generate.

items.headline: Red Sox 27-37, buried in AL East cellar, 11.5 games back of Rays
items.snark: We're chasing the Rays from 11.5 games back, which is like trying to catch a cab by crawling.

items.headline: Tyron Guerrero's lengthy absence included struggles with mechanics and mental health
items.snark: Guerrero battled mental health issues during his absence, and honestly watching this offense could drive anyone insane.

items.headline: Christian Gonzalez returns to minicamp, says 'I want to be rewarded as a Patriot'
items.snark: Gonzalez wants to be rewarded as a Patriot, which means he's about to learn what a Krafty negotiation feels like.

items.headline: Drake Maye sharp at minicamp Day 1, back-shoulder fade TD to AJ Brown the highlight
items.snark: Maye looked great throwing to Brown in practice, which means we're one non-contact drill away from a Super Bowl.

items.headline: Gabe Jacas absent from minicamp, Vrabel says 'He had a procedure, not under contract'
items.snark: Second-rounder Jacas hasn't practiced since being drafted, which is one way to avoid getting cut in camp.

items.headline: Kayshon Boutte attends minicamp, says 'There's always competition' after AJ Brown trade
items.snark: Boutte talking about competition is like the Titanic's band talking about encores.
